description: Publish the existing annotated v0.3.3 tag as a non-draft, non-prerelease GitHub Release with notes grounded in CHANGELOG.md and the validated native Hermes proof. GitHub Actions remain off limits.
acceptance: R-1: GitHub Release v0.3.3 exists for the existing annotated tag and is neither draft nor prerelease.
R-2: Release notes accurately summarize native Hermes prompt capability detection and the validated WSL proof without synthetic claims.
R-3: Remote release and tag readback confirm the published URL and exact release commit; GitHub Actions are not used.

evidence.summary: R-1 complete: GitHub Release v0.3.3 exists at https://github.com/viggomeesters/go-workflow-stack/releases/tag/v0.3.3 and remote readback reports draft=false, prerelease=false, latest_tag=v0.3.3. R-2 complete: release notes are grounded in CHANGELOG.md and docs/live-hermes-proof.json; consistency check confirmed the real Hermes path /home/viggo/.local/bin/hermes, Hermes Agent v0.18.2, and four successful native protocol phases. R-3 complete: remote annotated tag object 4cba07420f7c071a9d4778f0f29c6fc535a54672 peels exactly to release commit 697f89baa8d43105a715b662c6f3b46d37ba8a4b. GitHub Actions were not used. Validation and git diff --check passed.
